title: The Midnight Auction
description: A private auction gathers beneath lantern light. You recognize false bids, hidden value, and three different attempts to manipulate the room.

options.title: Buy the Hidden Masterpiece
options.description: Risk your capital on the one item everyone else overlooked.

options.title: Control the Bidding
options.description: Turn every rival's deception into your profit.

options.title: Expose the Rigging
options.description: Reveal the scheme and restore honest trade to the room.
